Workshop · Handoff

Vacation Care — PES (Simplify Bookings) — Developer Handoff

Build from this spec, not from Figma. The runnable prototype is the source of truth for pixels; this page is the contract for behaviour, states, tokens, redlines, accessibility, and acceptance.

Status: In review · Version 0.1 (2026-06-25) · Direction: Dark mobile · Spec: HANDOFF.md · Agent export: manifest.json

▶ Open the prototype

Scope & flow map

IDScreenPurposePrototype
S1New BookingAssemble a booking: child, booking type, session, then dates.open
S2Select ChildChoose the child the booking is for.open
S3Select SessionChoose the session type to book.open
S4Select date(s)Pick one or more dates for the session.open
S5Review requestReview the assembled booking before confirming.open
S6Request confirmedConfirm the request was submitted.open

S1 · New Booking

▶ open the live screen

Assemble a booking: child, booking type, session, then dates. Entry: Tap 'New Booking' (cold start) · Exit: Each field opens a picker (S2/S3/S4); Review → S5 when complete

ElementText
TitleNew Booking
LabelsChild's name / Booking type / Session(s) / Dates
Booking typeCasual — For one-off sessions
CTAReview
ElementSpec
Background--sd-colour-grey-1200 (#121212)
Header / fields surface--sd-colour-grey-1100 surface; field border --sd-colour-grey-1000
Section labelsorange-500, 12px, 600
Field height56px, radius 14
CTA48px, radius 12; orange-600 enabled / grey-1050 disabled

Interaction & behaviour

  • Tapping Child's name → S2; Session(s) → S3; Dates → S4.
  • Booking type toggles Casual ⇄ Recurring (helper text updates).
  • Dates field appears only after a session is selected; changing the session clears dates.
  • Review is enabled only when a child, a session, and ≥1 date are set.

Acceptance criteria

  • Review is disabled until child + session + ≥1 date.
  • Dates field appears only after a session is chosen.
  • Changing session clears selected dates.

S2 · Select Child

▶ open the live screen

Choose the child the booking is for. Entry: From S1 Child's name field · Exit: Tap a child → S1 with child set; back → S1

ElementText
TitleSelect Child
RowGemma Santiago — Little Bugs
ElementSpec
Rowavatar 40px; name 16px; service grey-500 13px; divider grey-1100

Interaction & behaviour

  • Tapping a child sets it and returns to S1.

Acceptance criteria

  • Selecting a child returns to S1 with it set.

S3 · Select Session

▶ open the live screen

Choose the session type to book. Entry: From S1 Session(s) field · Exit: Tap a session → S1 with session set

ElementText
GroupsBEFORE SCHOOL CARE / AFTER SCHOOL CARE / VACATION CARE / OTHER
Waitlist rowRequest a space — Billing determined by admin
ElementSpec
Group headergrey-500, 12px, uppercase, 1px tracking

Interaction & behaviour

  • Tapping a session sets it (and its waitlist flag) and returns to S1.

Acceptance criteria

  • 'Request a space' marks the booking as waitlist.

S4 · Select date(s)

▶ open the live screen

Pick one or more dates for the session. Entry: From S1 Dates field · Exit: Save → S1 with dates set

ElementText
TitleSelect date(s)
GuidanceSelect one or more dates you would like to book for {session}
LegendAvailable / Waitlist Only
Footer{n} selected · Save
ElementSpec
Day cell36px circle; selected available = orange-500, selected waitlist = purple-550 fill
Disabled/out-of-month daygrey-700, strikethrough, not tappable

Interaction & behaviour

  • Tapping an available/waitlist day toggles its selection; disabled days (weekends + blocked) and out-of-month days are not selectable.
  • Selected available days fill orange; selected waitlist-only days fill purple.
  • Save is enabled once ≥1 date is selected and returns to S1.

Acceptance criteria

  • Disabled and out-of-month days can't be selected.
  • Save is disabled until ≥1 date selected.
  • Selected day fill matches its kind.

S5 · Review request

▶ open the live screen

Review the assembled booking before confirming. Entry: From S1 Review · Exit: Confirm → S6; back → S1

ElementText
TitleReview request
AlertPricing details only apply to available dates. Waitlisted bookings will have their pricing information attached if confirmed.
TotalTOTAL £0.00 (waitlist) / price × dates (available)
CTAConfirm
ElementSpec
Summary rowgrey-500 label (96px) + right-aligned white value

Interaction & behaviour

  • Waitlist sessions show the Waitlist-only pill and a £0.00 total.
  • Priced sessions total = session price × number of dates.
  • Confirm advances to S6.

Acceptance criteria

  • Waitlist total is £0.00 and shows the pill.
  • Priced total = price × dates.

S6 · Request confirmed

▶ open the live screen

Confirm the request was submitted. Entry: From S5 Confirm · Exit: Done → resets to S1

ElementText
TitleRequest confirmed
AlertYou will receive an email shortly for all confirmed booking details.
CTADone
ElementSpec
Success check56px cyan-500 circle, white tick

Interaction & behaviour

  • Done resets all state and returns to S1.

Acceptance criteria

  • Done resets the flow.

State & edge matrix

StateTriggerUICopyRecoveryPrototype
cta-disabledBooking incompletedisabled CTAReviewComplete child + session + datesopen
dates-disabledWeekend / blocked / out-of-month daystrikethrough, non-interactive—Pick an open dayopen
waitlist'Request a space' sessionpurple pill + purple date fill + £0.00Waitlist onlyn/aopen

Platform deltas

Areaiosandroid
Status barsystem status barsystem status bar
Date pickerin-app month grid (no system picker)in-app month grid

Open questions

QuestionOwnerDueStatus
Recurring booking: full weekly-pattern builder is out of scope here — confirm its own flow.Sam2026-07-02open
Where do available vs waitlist date states + pricing come from (service availability API)?David2026-07-02open
Leading/trailing calendar cells render as '·' in the proto; Figma shows greyed adjacent-month dates — confirm desired.Sam2026-07-02open

VersionDateChange
0.12026-06-25Initial PES handoff (New Booking → child → session → dates → review → confirmed).
